lamaison.title: Our House | Golden Sweet
lamaison.hero_subtitle: From first healthy recipes to global vision
lamaison.history_title: Born from awareness, dedicated to well-being
lamaison.history_text: Golden Sweet was founded in 2019, during the COVID-19 pandemic, when health and immunity became global priorities. This moment shaped our vision: indulgence should never come at the expense of well-being. From day one, we chose to create 100% natural, sugar-free pastries designed to be safe, balanced, and bring true peace of mind.
lamaison.timeline_2019_desc: From the very beginning, we built every recipe on six pillars of healthy indulgence: lactose-free, sugar-free, no white flour used, using natural fermentation, gluten-free, and free from hydrogenated oil. We rebuilt our pastries with natural oils like argan, olive, and coconut, and alternative flours such as barley, almond, and corn.
lamaison.timeline_2021_desc: As the brand grew, our focus shifted to perfecting balance  improving taste and texture without compromising our health-first philosophy. We introduced strict standards for ingredient sourcing, preparation methods, and food safety, ensuring consistency and reliability in every product, every day.
lamaison.timeline_2023_desc: Golden Sweet expanded its production capacity and menu offerings while remaining faithful to its core values. Each new product was developed with the same attention to freshness, safety, and sugar-free formulation, proving that growth can happen without sacrificing quality or integrity.
lamaison.timeline_2026_desc: Looking ahead, Golden Sweet?s ambition is to expand through franchising, allowing the brand to reach new cities and countries. By replicating our recipes, processes, and quality standards locally, we aim to offer the same safe, natural, and refined experience worldwide.
lamaison.value1_desc: Crafted for your safety and peace of mind, using carefully selected natural ingredients.
lamaison.value2_desc: Freshly prepared every day to ensure quality, safety, and consistent flavor.
lamaison.value3_desc: Our flavors are carefully selected to offer an authentic Moroccan experience, where premium quality meets refined taste in every detail.
lamaison.value4_desc: Built on honesty and responsibility, with clear sourcing and support for the local community.
lamaison.vision_desc: We believe that the luxury of indulgence and well-being should go hand in hand. At Golden Sweet, we craft sugar-free, health-focused pastries without compromising taste, quality, or pleasure. Our vision is to grow across the world while staying true to our core values: clean ingredients, consistent quality, and trust. By refining our recipes and processes, we aim to make better pastry the new standard?accessible, reliable, and genuinely healthier.
